name: Prima.Form

unions.name: FormField
unions.comment:
Defines a Field component for a generic form.
Opaque implementation.

unions.name: FormFieldConfig
unions.comment:
Defines a configuration for a Field component.
Opaque implementation.

aliases.name: CheckboxOption
aliases.comment: Checkbox's single option. Can be only used with `checkboxWithOptionsConfig`.
aliases.type: { label : String, slug : String, isChecked : Bool }

values.name: autocompleteConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> Bool -> Maybe String -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> Maybe String) -> (model -> Maybe String) -> (Maybe String -> msg) -> (Maybe String -> msg) -> List AutocompleteOption -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: checkboxConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> Bool) -> (Bool -> msg) -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: checkboxWithOptionsConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> List ( String, Bool )) -> (String -> Bool -> msg) -> List CheckboxOption -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: datepickerConfig
values.comment: Datepicker configuration method. Uses Bogdanp/elm-datepicker under the hood.
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> (model -> Maybe Date) -> (Msg -> msg) -> DatePicker -> Settings -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: radioConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> Maybe String) -> (Maybe String -> msg) -> List RadioOption -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: render
values.comment: The only available method to Render a component.
values.type: model -> FormField model msg -> Html msg

values.name: selectConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> Bool -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> Maybe String) -> (Bool -> msg) -> (Maybe String -> msg) -> List SelectOption -> Bool -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg

values.name: textConfig
values.type: String -> String -> Bool -> List (Attribute msg) -> (model -> Maybe String) -> (Maybe String -> msg) -> List (Validation model) -> FormField model msg
